content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 25 focused on stabilizing the cloud API, improving CI/CD release workflows, and refining agent orchestration. Key efforts included fixing critical API crashes, addressing CI startup failures for cross-platform releases, and managing sub-agent behavior.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Cloud API Stability:** Resolved a 500 error in `POST /v1/chat/completions` that occurred when `tool_choice: "required"` was passed, preventing crashes in the cloud-api package ([#7992](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7992)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **OS & Infrastructure:** [#7990](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7990), [#7986](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7986), [#7979](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7979), [#7977](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7977), [#7973](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7973), [#7971](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7971), [#7949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7949).
*   **CI/CD Fixes:** [#7980](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7980), [#7978](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7978), [#7976](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7976), [#7950](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7950).
*   **Desktop & Local Inference:** [#7988](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7988), [#7987](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7987), [#7983](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7983), [#7982](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7982).
*   **Core & Plugins:** [#7985](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7985), [#7984](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7984), [#7981](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7981), [#7972](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7972), [#7969](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7969), [#7968](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7968), [#7966](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7966), [#7965](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7965), [#7958](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7958), [#7957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7957), [#7956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7956), [#7955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7955), [#7954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7954), [#7953](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7953), [#7952](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7952), [#7951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7951), [#7947](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7947), [#7946](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7946).
*   **Documentation:** [#7975](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7975), [#7948](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7948).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   **Safety & Policy:** [#7925](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7925) was closed following a discussion on personal-crisis safety scaffolds, concluding that per-agent character configuration is the preferred approach over framework-level defaults.

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Orchestration & Logic:** [#7967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7967), [#7964](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7964), [#7962](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7962), [#7963](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7963), [#7960](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7960), [#7959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7959), [#7961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7961), [#7970](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7970).
*   **Compliance & Environment:** [#7974](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7974), [#7991](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7991).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#7837](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7837) Release orchestrator startup_failure:** Progress has been made by modifying reusable workflows to make secrets optional, preventing startup crashes. Follow-up work is focused on implementing clear skip paths and manifest validation to handle missing platform-specific credentials gracefully.
*   **[#7770](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7770) Configure release credentials:** Development is ongoing to establish a cross-platform OTA pipeline. Recent efforts include providing administrative playbooks for apt-repo publishing, with plans to extend documentation to Android, Apple, and Homebrew subsets.
